title: Vietnamese Banana Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir fry with banana and savory sauce, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Fry
ingredients.notes: your choice of stir-fry vegetables (e.g. bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: 1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add your choice of stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender.
3. Add the savory sauce and stir to combine.
4. Add the sliced banana and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
